scripts.generate: node -e "import('node:fs').then(fs => fs.rmSync('./generated', { recursive: true, force: true }))" && openapi --input ./openapi.yaml --output ./generated --client fetch --exportCore true --exportServices true --exportModels true --useUnionTypes true
scripts.clean: node -e "import('node:fs').then(fs => fs.rmSync('./generated', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
